Library.Name: #BreakpointLogging
Library.DefaultResolution: Breakpoint Logging Functions, * (3S - Smart Software Solutions GmbH)

Value.name: _x0032_00
Value.desc: Configured Name of Ethernet Interface (PLC 2).

Parameter.Name: NetworkInterfaceName
Parameter.Description: Configured Name of Ethernet Interface (PLC 2).

Value.name: _x0032_01
Value.desc: Configured IP Address of the Ethernet Interface (PLC 2).

Parameter.Name: IPAddress
Parameter.Description: Configured IP Address of the Ethernet Interface (PLC 2).

Value.name: _x0032_02
Value.desc: Configured Subnet Mask of the Ethernet Interface (PLC 2).

Parameter.Name: SubnetMask
Parameter.Description: Configured Subnet Mask of the Ethernet Interface (PLC 2).

Value.name: _x0032_03
Value.desc: Configured Default Gateway of the Ethernet Interface (PLC 2).

Parameter.Name: GatewayAddress
Parameter.Description: Configured Default Gateway of the Ethernet Interface (PLC 2).

Value.name: _x0030_
Value.desc: Configure IP Address of the Controller on the EtherNet bus (IP).

Parameter.Name: IPAddress
Parameter.Description: Configure IP Address of the Controller on the EtherNet bus (IP).

Value.name: _x0031_
Value.desc: Configure IP Address of the Controller on the EtherNet bus (Mask).

Parameter.Name: SubnetMask
Parameter.Description: Configure IP Address of the Controller on the EtherNet bus (Mask).

Value.name: _x0032_
Value.desc: Configure IP Address of the Controller on the EtherNet bus (Gateway).

Parameter.Name: GatewayAddress
Parameter.Description: Configure IP Address of the Controller on the EtherNet bus (Gateway).

Value.name: _x0033_
Value.desc: Configure Bus speed of the EtherNet.

Parameter.Name: TransferRate
Parameter.Description: Configure Bus speed of the EtherNet.

Value.name: _x0034_
Value.desc: Configure the method this device uses for obtaining an IP address.

Parameter.Name: IPConfigMode
Parameter.Description: Configure the method this device uses for obtaining an IP address.

Value.name: _x0035_
Value.desc: Configure the Network-/Device- Name, e.g. for DHCP addressing Use case.

Parameter.Name: DeviceName
Parameter.Description: Configure the Network-/Device- Name, e.g. for DHCP addressing Use case.

Value.name: _x0036_
Value.desc: Configure activation of WEB server

Parameter.Name: WebServer
Parameter.Description: Configure activation of WEB server

Value.name: _x0039_
Value.desc: MAC Address

Parameter.Name: MACAddress
Parameter.Description: MAC Address

Value.name: _x0031_0
Value.desc: Configure Name of Network Interface

Parameter.Name: NetworkInterfaceName
Parameter.Description: Configure Name of Network Interface

Value.name: _x0031_1
Value.desc: Configure EtherNet Protocol (Ethernet2 or 802.3 frames)

Parameter.Name: EtherNetProtocol
Parameter.Description: Configure EtherNet Protocol (Ethernet2 or 802.3 frames)

Value.name: _x0031_2
Value.desc: Configure Name of Network Interface - Unicode

Parameter.Name: NetworkInterfaceName
Parameter.Description: Configure Name of Network Interface - Unicode

Value.name: _x0031_3
Value.desc: TRUE: IP, SubnetMask and GatewayAddress will be set to the configured values at the PLC's OS!

Parameter.Name: SaveCommunicationSettings
Parameter.Description: TRUE: IP, SubnetMask and GatewayAddress will be set to the configured values at the PLC's OS!

Value.name: _x0031_00
Value.desc: Actual IP Address of the Controller on the EtherNet bus (IP).

Parameter.Name: IPAddress
Parameter.Description: Actual IP Address of the Controller on the EtherNet bus (IP).

Value.name: _x0031_01
Value.desc: Actual IP Address of the Controller on the EtherNet bus (Mask).

Parameter.Name: SubnetMask
Parameter.Description: Actual IP Address of the Controller on the EtherNet bus (Mask).

Value.name: _x0031_02
Value.desc: Actual IP Address of the Controller on the EtherNet bus (Gateway).

Parameter.Name: GatewayAddress
Parameter.Description: Actual IP Address of the Controller on the EtherNet bus (Gateway).

Value.desc: Actual Bus speed of the EtherNet.

Parameter.Name: TransferRate
Parameter.Description: Actual Bus speed of the EtherNet.

Value.name: _x0031_04
Value.desc: Actual method this device uses for obtaining an IP address.

Parameter.Name: IPConfigMode
Parameter.Description: Actual method this device uses for obtaining an IP address.

Value.name: _x0031_05
Value.desc: Actual Network-/Device- Name, e.g. for DHCP addressing Use case.

Parameter.Name: DeviceName
Parameter.Description: Actual Network-/Device- Name, e.g. for DHCP addressing Use case.

Value.name: _x0031_06
Value.desc: Actual activation state of WEB server

Parameter.Name: WebServer
Parameter.Description: Actual activation state of WEB server

Value.name: _x0031_07
Value.desc: Actual network status.

Parameter.Name: NetworkStatus
Parameter.Description: Actual network status.

Value.name: _x0031_08
Value.desc: Actual module status.

Parameter.Name: ModuleStatus
Parameter.Description: Actual module status.

Value.name: _x0031_09
Value.desc: Actual MAC Address.

Parameter.Name: MACAddress
Parameter.Description: Actual MAC Address.

Value.name: _x0031_10
Value.desc: Actual Name of Network Interface

Parameter.Name: NetworkInterfaceName
Parameter.Description: Actual Name of Network Interface

Value.name: _x0031_11
Value.desc: Actual configured EtherNet Protocol

Parameter.Name: EtherNetProtocol
Parameter.Description: Actual configured EtherNet Protocol

Value.name: _x0032_006
Value.desc: Ethernet diagnostic information

Element.name: IPChanges
Element.desc: Amount of IP configuration changes since startup (IP or gateway address or subnet mask)

Parameter.Name: EthDiag
Parameter.Description: Ethernet diagnostic information

Value.name: _x0032_007
Value.desc: Diag Acknowledge

Parameter.Name: Diag Acknowledge
Parameter.Description: Diag Acknowledge

Value.name: _x0031_0000000
Value.desc: enable/disable configuration of parameter WebServer

Parameter.Name: WebserverVisible
Parameter.Description: enable/disable configuration of parameter WebServer

Value.name: _x0031_0000001
Value.desc: enable/disable configuration of parameter NetworkInterfaceName

Parameter.Name: NetworkInterfaceVisible
Parameter.Description: enable/disable configuration of parameter NetworkInterfaceName

Value.name: _x0031_0000002
Value.desc: enable/disable Online-Status Screen

Parameter.Name: OnlineStatusScreenEnabled
Parameter.Description: enable/disable Online-Status Screen

Value.name: _x0031_0000003
Value.desc: NIC whose communication settings shall not be changed.

Parameter.Name: ReadOnlyNIC
Parameter.Description: NIC whose communication settings shall not be changed.

Value.name: _x0031_0000004
Value.desc: Use async task to check the network connectivity. This relieves the bus cycle task.

Parameter.Name: UseAsyncTask
Parameter.Description: Use async task to check the network connectivity. This relieves the bus cycle task.

Value.name: _x0032_0000000
Value.desc: Dummy Parameter

Parameter.Name: Dummy Parameter
Parameter.Description: Dummy Parameter

Value.name: _x0038_05306369
Value.desc: Show the logger page for the scanner

Parameter.Name: ShowLoggerPage
Parameter.Description: Show the logger page for the scanner

Value.name: _x0030_
Value.desc: Configuration of the TimeOut

Parameter.Name: Timeout
Parameter.Description: Configuration of the TimeOut

Value.name: _x0033_
Value.desc: Configure the size of the Ioscanner register

Parameter.Name: InputAssemblySize
Parameter.Description: Configure the size of the Ioscanner register

Value.name: _x0034_
Value.desc: Configure the size of the Ioscanner register

Parameter.Name: OutputAssemblySize
Parameter.Description: Configure the size of the Ioscanner register

Value.name: _x0036_
Value.desc: Port where the Server is listening for requests

Parameter.Name: Port
Parameter.Description: Port where the Server is listening for requests

Value.name: _x0038_
Value.desc: Bind Mdobus port to IP address of specified ethernet adaper

Parameter.Name: BindPort
Parameter.Description: Bind Mdobus port to IP address of specified ethernet adaper

Value.name: _x0031_0
Value.desc: the driver optimizes the io update

Parameter.Name: OptimizationOn
Parameter.Description: the driver optimizes the io update

Value.name: _x0031_1
Value.desc: Holding Registers as %Q-data for local update by application

Parameter.Name: UpdateableHolding
Parameter.Description: Holding Registers as %Q-data for local update by application

Value.name: _x0031_2
Value.desc: Coils and Discrete Inputs data blocks get their own IO-Mapping

Parameter.Name: DistinctBitAreas
Parameter.Description: Coils and Discrete Inputs data blocks get their own IO-Mapping

Value.name: _x0031_3
Value.desc: Number of Coils

Parameter.Name: Coils Size
Parameter.Description: Number of Coils

Value.name: _x0031_4
Value.desc: Number of Discrete Inputs

Parameter.Name: Discrete Inputs Size
Parameter.Description: Number of Discrete Inputs

Value.name: _x0032_0
Value.desc: Start Addresses of Modbus Data Areas

Parameter.Name: StartAdresses
Parameter.Description: Start Addresses of Modbus Data Areas

Value.name: _x0032_1
Value.desc: 0 = default, 1 = Holding- and Input-Register Data Areas overlay

Parameter.Name: Data Model Options
Parameter.Description: 0 = default, 1 = Holding- and Input-Register Data Areas overlay

Value.name: _x0032_2
Value.desc: Close TCP-socket at timeout

Parameter.Name: CloseTCPsocketAtTimeout
Parameter.Description: Close TCP-socket at timeout

Value.name: _x0033_1
Value.desc: COM port number to use for the serial communication

Parameter.Name: ComPort
Parameter.Description: COM port number to use for the serial communication

Value.name: _x0033_2
Value.desc: Baudrate of the serial port.

Parameter.Name: Baudrate
Parameter.Description: Baudrate of the serial port.

Value.name: _x0034_0
Value.desc: Device's status information

Element.name: RequestCounter
Element.desc: Total number of incomming client requests

Element.name: ExceptionCounter
Element.desc: Number of Request that have been rejected with Exception Code

Parameter.Name: Status
Parameter.Description: Device's status information

Value.name: _x0031_00
Value.desc: Actual value of the TimeOut configured

Parameter.Name: Timeout
Parameter.Description: Actual value of the TimeOut configured

Value.name: _x0031_03
Value.desc: Actual value of the size of the assembly

Parameter.Name: InputAssemblySize
Parameter.Description: Actual value of the size of the assembly

Value.name: _x0031_04
Value.desc: Actual value of the size of the assembly

Parameter.Name: OutputAssemblySize
Parameter.Description: Actual value of the size of the assembly

Value.name: _x0031_06
Value.desc: Current Port where the Server is listening for requests

Parameter.Name: Port
Parameter.Description: Current Port where the Server is listening for requests

Value.name: _x0031_07
Value.desc: Current Unit-ID of the Server (optional)

Parameter.Name: Unit-ID
Parameter.Description: Current Unit-ID of the Server (optional)

Value.name: _x0032_00
Value.desc: enable/disable Online-Status Screen

Parameter.Name: OnlineStatusScreenEnabled
Parameter.Description: enable/disable Online-Status Screen
